{"query":"IOC Russia suspension status July 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1572,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"🇷🇺 The IOC has provisionally lifted the suspension of the Russian Olympic Committee, effective July 7, 2026, ending a ban in place since October 2023. The decision opens the door for Russian athletes to return to international competition as qualification for the LA28 Olympics continues.Jul 7, 2026"},"results":[{"url":"https://www.olympics.com/ioc/news/ioc-provisionally-lifts-suspension-of-russian-olympic-committee-recommendations-to-ifs-with-regard-to-russian-athletes-participation-no-longer-applicable","title":"IOC provisionally lifts suspension of Russian Olympic Committee – Recommendations to IFs with regard to Russian athletes’ participation no longer applicable","content":"This support, and the support of many IFs, contributed to the successful participation of Ukrainian athletes and teams in the Paris 2024 Olympic Games and the Milano Cortina 2026 Olympic Winter Games.
Following a request from the 11th Olympic Summit later that year, in March 2023, the IOC EB issued its recommendations for IFs and international sports event organisers regarding the return to international competition for athletes holding a Russian or Belarusian passport as Individual Neutral Athletes (IOC recommendations).
Since the recommendations were issued, Individual Neutral Athletes have participated in numerous international IF events, as well as in the Paris 2024 Olympic Games and the Milano Cortina 2026 Olympic Winter Games.
In this regard, in December 2025, in view of the upcoming Dakar 2026 Youth Olympic Games, the Olympic Summit endorsed the IOC EB’s decision that youth athletes with a Russian or Belarusian passport should no longer be restricted in their access to international youth competitions, in both individual and team sports.
Furthermore, at its meeting on 7 May 2026, the IOC EB decided to lift the recommended conditions of participation for International Federations and international sports event organisers of 28 February 2022 and 28 March 2023 as they relate to Belarus and Belarusian athletes, including the protective measures.
Tel: +41 21 621 6000, email: pressoffice@olympic.org, or visit our web site at www.ioc.org."},{"url":"https://www.cnn.com/2026/07/07/sport/video/ioc-president-provisionally-lift-suspension-russian-olympic-committee-digvid-vrtc","title":"IOC provisionally lifts suspension of Russian Olympic Committee | CNN","content":"IOC President Kirsty Coventry spoke about the International Olympic Committee (IOC) Executive Board's decision to provisionally lift the suspension of the Russian Olympic Committee (ROC) that had been in effect since October 2023, ending neutral status vetting for Russian athletes, a step towards Russia's return and ahead of the Los Angeles 2028 Games.
China denies Trump’s election interference claims."},{"url":"https://www.npr.org/2026/07/07/nx-s1-5884868/russia-olympics-ban-lifted-ioc-2028-los-angeles-games","title":"IOC lifts Russia suspension ahead of 2028 Los Angeles Olympic Games : NPR","content":"International Olympic Committee President Kirsty Coventry speaks at the SwissTech Convention Center, in Lausanne, Switzerland, on June 24.
The IOC eased entry requirements to its own events for Russian athletes and teams while provisionally lifting its suspension since October 2023 of the Russian Olympic Committee."},{"url":"https://www.tabletennisdaily.com/forum/topics/just-in-ioc-provisionally-lifts-suspension-of-russian-olympic-committee.39644/","title":"Just in: IOC provisionally lifts suspension of Russian Olympic Committee | TableTennisDaily","content":"Jul 7, 2026 — Confirms Reinstatement of Athletes with Russian Passports Decision takes effect from 28 July 2026, in line with IOC decision of 7 July 2026
Decision takes effect from 28 July 2026, in line with IOC decision of 7 July 2026 and the ITTF Executive Board's own decision concerning athletes with Belarusian passports
Alongside this decision, the ITTF reaffirms its solidarity with the Ukrainian table tennis community and recognises the profound impact that the ongoing war has had on Ukrainian athletes, coaches, officials, clubs, and families."}]}

{"query":"IOC Russia suspension status July 2026","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.houstonpublicmedia.org/npr/2026/07/07/nx-s1-5884868/international-olympic-committee-lifts-russia-suspension-ahead-of-2028-la-games","title":"International Olympic Committee lifts Russia suspension ahead of 2028 LA Games | NPR & Houston Public Media","content":"# International Olympic Committee lifts Russia suspension ahead of 2028 LA Games. The International Olympic Committee advised sports bodies to end a three-year program vetting Russians for neutral status ahead of qualifying events for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics. LAUSANNE, Switzerland — The IOC advised Olympic sports bodies on Tuesday to end a three-year program vetting Russians for neutral status ahead of qualifying events for the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics. ### The IOC says it will not invite Russia and Belarus to the 2024 Olympics in Paris. While Russia and Belarus will not receive formal invitations, the International Olympic Committee says it will not stop athletes from the two countries from participating as neutral contestants. "The IOC stands in solidarity with the Olympic community of Ukraine, which the Olympic movement has supported since the beginning of the war, and will continue to do so," the Olympic body said in a statement after a meeting of its executive board.","score":0.8939131,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zuPa5yfAg7A","title":"IOC decision paves way for Russia's return to international sport","content":"IOC decision paves way for Russia's return to international sport
Reuters
4260000 subscribers
12 likes
832 views
8 Jul 2026
The International Olympic Committee provisionally lifted its suspension of the Russian Olympic Committee, marking a significant step towards Russia's reintegration into the Olympic fold ahead of the Los Angeles 2028 Games.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #olympics #sports #russia

","score":0.8765607,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.npr.org/2026/07/08/g-s1-132480/russia-olympics-ioc-decision","title":"IOC clears way for Russian athletes to return to Olympics : NPR","content":"**IOC clears way for Russian athletes to return to Olympics** **The International Olympic Committee decision effectively overturns a decade-long ban on Russian athletes from international sport imposed due to a state-sponsored doping scandal and Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine.**. # The IOC clears the way for Russian athletes to return to Olympic competition. A man walks outside the Russian National Olympic Committee building in Moscow on Tuesday. MOSCOW — The International Olympic Committee (IOC) "provisionally" lifted its suspension of Russia on Tuesday — a decision laced with controversy amid Russia's ongoing war in Ukraine that nonetheless opens a path for Russian athletes to compete as full-fledged participants in the 2028 Olympic Games in Los Angeles and beyond. The decision effectively overturns the IOC's decade-long ban on Russian athletes from international sport — the price of a state-sponsored doping scandal dating back to the Russian-hosted Sochi Games of 2014 as well as the Kremlin's full-scale invasion of its neighbor eight years later.","score":0.8684817,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.nytimes.com/2026/07/07/world/europe/russia-olympic-suspension-lifted.html","title":"I.O.C. Lifts Russia's Olympic Suspension, Clearing the Way ...","content":"The International Olympic Committee on Tuesday lifted its suspension of Russia related to its invasion of Ukraine, clearing the way for Russia","score":0.8616433,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KOYxUZTis5s","title":"IOC Provisionally Lifts Ban On russian Olympics Committee ...","content":"The International Olympic Committee has provisionally lifted its suspension of the Russian Olympic Committee, Airdate: July 7, 2026.","score":0.8524574,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.07,"request_id":"ad989629-e14f-476a-b45c-255b4d984d99"}
